description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, minimalist design, featuring a flat top surface and four straight legs. The tabletop is composed of light-colored wood planks with visible natural grain patterns and subtle color variations. The legs are sturdy and positioned at each corner, providing stable support for the table. There are no visible decorative elements, hardware, or additional features such as drawers or shelves. The finish appears to be matte, highlighting the natural texture and color of the wood. This table is suitable for use in parks, public spaces, or outdoor seating areas in urban environments.
description: A simple, rectangular wooden table with a flat top and four straight legs, finished in a natural light wood tone. The design is minimalist and functional, with visible wood grain and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow width of the tabletop and two of the four legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the tabletop and all four legs, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the narrow width and two legs.
description_view_3: Rear view, identical to the front, showing the full length and all four legs.
